# Peninsula Equine

> Premium equine environments — covered arenas, stables, equine estates, recovery stations and infrastructure — engineered and built on the Mornington Peninsula, Victoria.

Peninsula Equine designs and constructs horse properties from the ground up: site assessment, groundworks, drainage, arena footing, stables, fencing, covered structures and full-facility builds. Work is led by horse people and backed by construction discipline. The studio also licenses GroundLock — a footing and surface system for arenas and event grounds.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Peninsula Equine's work and approach.
- [About](/about): Built by horse people, backed by construction.
- [Services](/services): Full capability list — arenas, stables, infrastructure, fencing, full-facility builds.
- [Arenas](/arenas): Covered and outdoor riding arenas, engineered footing and drainage.
- [Stables](/stables): Stable construction and barn design.
- [Infrastructure](/infrastructure): Groundworks, drainage, access tracks, site preparation.
- [Equine Estates](/equine-estates): Whole-property masterplanning and delivery.
- [Lumenarc](/lumenarc): Recovery-station and wellness-precinct system.
- [Selected Works](/selected-works): Featured projects.
- [Main Ridge Pavilion](/selected-works/main-ridge-pavilion): U-shaped stable, arena and pavilion build.
- [Aberdeen](/selected-works/aberdeen): Cinematic exterior and stable interiors.
- [Field Notes](/field-notes): Build logs and process notes from active sites.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Indicative ranges and how scope drives investment.
- [Site Assessment](/site-assessment): Paid qualification visit for new projects.
- [Lessons](/lessons): Horsemanship sessions hosted at HQ.
- [Events](/events): Clinics and on-site events.
- [Contact](/contact): Apply to build or request assessment.
